name: Woodfork, Dollye
description: Where's Dollye? Oh, just find Vina and you'll see Dollye. These two have been veritable twins during their stay at Normal. I wonder what they'll do now that the time of departure is here. Will make a successful teacher.
text: Where's Dollye? Oh, just find Vina and you'll see Dollye. These two have been veritable twins during their stay at Normal. I wonder what they'll do now that the time of departure is here. Will make a successful teacher.

name: Taylor, Odie Mae
description: Popularity and Odie are inseparable. No program is complete without her! Her winsome smile and charming disposition have won the love of all those with whom she has come in contact. We are sure that she will be gloriously successful in whatever she undertakes.
text: Popularity and Odie are inseparable. No program is complete without her! Her winsome smile and charming disposition have won the love of all those with whom she has come in contact. We are sure that she will be gloriously successful in whatever she undertakes.

name: Green, John T.
motto: "That it is the property of the religious spirit to be the most refining of all influences—No external advantage, no culture of the tastes, no habit of command, no association with the elegant or even depth of affection can bestow that delicacy and that grandeur of bearing which belong only to the mind accustomed to celestial conversation."
description: Has proven himself to be one of the dependable men on the hill, and is noted for work. He realizes.
text:
"That it is the property of the religious spirit to be the most refining of all influences—No external advantage, no culture of the tastes, no habit of command, no association with the elegant or even depth of affection can bestow that delicacy and that grandeur of bearing which belong only to the mind accustomed to celestial conversation."
Has proven himself to be one of the dependable men on the hill, and is noted for work. He realizes.

name: Stewart, Madye Covington
motto: "Home is the sphere of harmony and peace. The spot where angels find a resting place, when bearing blessings they descend to earth."
description: Mrs. Stewart is an excellent young woman, and has the ability to do many things. Apt with the needle. Won a medal in the Essay contest 1916. We are sure that she will make an ideal housekeeper.
text:
"Home is the sphere of harmony and peace. The spot where angels find a resting place, when bearing blessings they descend to earth."
Mrs. Stewart is an excellent young woman, and has the ability to do many things. Apt with the needle. Won a medal in the Essay contest 1916. We are sure that she will make an ideal housekeeper.

name: Dean, Solomon
motto: "Agriculture for an honorable and high minded man, is the best of all occupations or arts by which men procure the means of living."
description: Energetic and earnest. Full of business and will make good in the future, judging from what he has accomplished during his stay at Normal. He has pursued two courses. He realizes that.
text:
"Agriculture for an honorable and high minded man, is the best of all occupations or arts by which men procure the means of living."
Energetic and earnest. Full of business and will make good in the future, judging from what he has accomplished during his stay at Normal. He has pursued two courses. He realizes that.

name: Campbell, Mattie
motto: "Make no display of your talents or attainments, for every one will clearly see, admire, and acknowledge them, so long as you cover them with the beautiful veil of modesty."
description: Is a fine speaker and an excellent student. Very talented and modest. An active member of the King's Daughters.
text:
"Make no display of your talents or attainments, for every one will clearly see, admire, and acknowledge them, so long as you cover them with the beautiful veil of modesty."
Is a fine speaker and an excellent student. Very talented and modest. An active member of the King's Daughters.

name: Black, Nora
description: Nora has always been willing to do her bit to the best of her ability. Very industrious. We do not know just what Nora will do when she leaves us, but we know it will be something worth while. We hope her success.
text: Nora has always been willing to do her bit to the best of her ability. Very industrious. We do not know just what Nora will do when she leaves us, but we know it will be something worth while. We hope her success.

name: Penick, Iola
description: Has changed considerably since her last year in school. Very dignified. Has many friends. A lover of out-door sports. Her hobby is "Tennis." We don't quite know what Penick will be, but something brilliant and intellectual we are sure.
text: Has changed considerably since her last year in school. Very dignified. Has many friends. A lover of out-door sports. Her hobby is "Tennis." We don't quite know what Penick will be, but something brilliant and intellectual we are sure.

name: Brown, Edith
motto: "The motto of chivalry is also the motto of wisdom; to serve all, but love only one."
description: Smiles occasionally, but at most times serious. Her slogan is love.
text:
"The motto of chivalry is also the motto of wisdom; to serve all, but love only one."
Smiles occasionally, but at most times serious. Her slogan is love.

name: Griffith, Mattie T.
motto: "True humor springs not more from the head than from the heart. It is not contempt; its essence is love. It issues not in laughter, but in still smiles, which lie far deeper."
description: Prophet. Graduate of W. H. S., Owensboro, Ky. Her sweet disposition has won for her many friends among the teachers and students. Very witty.
text:
"True humor springs not more from the head than from the heart. It is not contempt; its essence is love. It issues not in laughter, but in still smiles, which lie far deeper."
Prophet. Graduate of W. H. S., Owensboro, Ky. Her sweet disposition has won for her many friends among the teachers and students. Very witty.

name: Penny, Margaret
description: She hasn't been with us long, but as the saying goes, "Better late than never." She's a fine girl and we've enjoyed her. She has a generous soul—and will be a well-known charity worker. An excellent student.
text: She hasn't been with us long, but as the saying goes, "Better late than never." She's a fine girl and we've enjoyed her. She has a generous soul—and will be a well-known charity worker. An excellent student.

name: Combs, Clyde L.
motto: "Society, if good, is a better refiner of the spirits than ordinary books."
description: A great Athlete. Very popular in his circle. To him—
text:
"Society, if good, is a better refiner of the spirits than ordinary books."
A great Athlete. Very popular in his circle. To him—

name: Johnson, Mary
motto: "In every rank, both great and small, it is industry that supports us all."
description: Industrious, quiet, and happy. Mary hasn't done much talking in our midst, but we are sure that she will make a success in life.
text:
"In every rank, both great and small, it is industry that supports us all."
Industrious, quiet, and happy. Mary hasn't done much talking in our midst, but we are sure that she will make a success in life.

name: Shelburne, McKinley
motto: "Cultured and fine manners are everywhere a passport to regard."
clubs: President of Y. M. C. A.
description: A very pleasant young man who has many friends. He serves as a model for other young men.
text:
"Cultured and fine manners are everywhere a passport to regard."
A very pleasant young man who has many friends. He serves as a model for other young men.

name: Massie, Vivian
description: A cheerful person, one of that "Pollyanna" type who always is glad about something is Vivian. Quite patriotic. When she is a Red Cross Nurse, romantic she'll be—Peg O' some soldier's heart,— and when the war is over!
text: A cheerful person, one of that "Pollyanna" type who always is glad about something is Vivian. Quite patriotic. When she is a Red Cross Nurse, romantic she'll be—Peg O' some soldier's heart,— and when the war is over!

name: Banks, Marie A.
high school: C. S. H. S., Frankfort, Ky.
motto: "music is the harmonious voice of creation; an echo of the invisible world; it is a prophecy of what life is to be; the rainbow of promise translated out of seeing into hearing."
description: Has a beautiful soprano voice. Fond of music.
text:
"music is the harmonious voice of creation; an echo of the invisible world; it is a prophecy of what life is to be; the rainbow of promise translated out of seeing into hearing."
Has a beautiful soprano voice. Fond of music.

name: Williams, Buford
motto: "Deeds not words wrought the world."
description: Buford's logical, conclusive way of putting things has won our admiration. A lover of music. He always relieved us after hard periods by ringing the bell. Worthy cause!
text:
"Deeds not words wrought the world."
Buford's logical, conclusive way of putting things has won our admiration. A lover of music. He always relieved us after hard periods by ringing the bell. Worthy cause!

name: Adams, Annie Mae
motto: "There is no art or science that is too difficult for industry to attain to."
description: A very accomplished and industrious young lady. Very apt with the needle. Has already completed the course in sewing. Has prospects of a bright future.
text:
"There is no art or science that is too difficult for industry to attain to."
A very accomplished and industrious young lady. Very apt with the needle. Has already completed the course in sewing. Has prospects of a bright future.

name: Duncan, John W.
motto: "There is no index of character so sure as the voice."
description: We know him best by his excellent bass voice, with which he has so often entertained us.
text:
"There is no index of character so sure as the voice."
We know him best by his excellent bass voice, with which he has so often entertained us.

name: McFarland, Christina
motto: "This is such a serious world that we should never speak at all unless we have something to say."
description: A very quiet young lady.
text:
"This is such a serious world that we should never speak at all unless we have something to say."
A very quiet young lady.

name: Woodson, Ola Mae
motto: "Of all the arts beneath the heaven that man has found or God has given, none draws the soul so sweet away, as music's melting, mystic lay; slight emblem of the bliss above, it soothes the spirit all to love."
description: Winsome, kind and musical. Behold the one and only, whose second name should have been. She sure can make the piano talk.
text:
"Of all the arts beneath the heaven that man has found or God has given, none draws the soul so sweet away, as music's melting, mystic lay; slight emblem of the bliss above, it soothes the spirit all to love."
Winsome, kind and musical. Behold the one and only, whose second name should have been. She sure can make the piano talk.

name: Caruthers, Lunderman
description: Caruthers believes that the life worth living is the life of the farmer. He is a fine young man and will make good.
text: Caruthers believes that the life worth living is the life of the farmer. He is a fine young man and will make good.

name: Payne, Lee Ella
motto: "Industry." If you have great talents, industry will improve them; if but moderate abilities, industry will supply their deficiencies.
description: Very quiet and dignified. Good in her studies.
text:
"Industry." If you have great talents, industry will improve them; if but moderate abilities, industry will supply their deficiencies.
Very quiet and dignified. Good in her studies.

name: Gentry, John
motto: "Success in life is a matter not so much of talent or opportunity as of concentration and perseverance."
description: A very dignified young man. He is preparing to "do his bit" as a stenographer, maybe in some recruiting office. Whatever he undertakes we are sure success will be his reward.
text:
"Success in life is a matter not so much of talent or opportunity as of concentration and perseverance."
A very dignified young man. He is preparing to "do his bit" as a stenographer, maybe in some recruiting office. Whatever he undertakes we are sure success will be his reward.

name: Bots, Fannie Mae
motto: "The fairest flower in the garden of creation is a young mind, offering and unfolding itself to the influence of divine wisdom, as the heliotrope turns its sweet blossoms to the sun."
description: Tiny, pleasant and ambitious. An all-round student who is expecting to pursue a college course. Fannie Mae has made many friends during her stay here.
text:
"The fairest flower in the garden of creation is a young mind, offering and unfolding itself to the influence of divine wisdom, as the heliotrope turns its sweet blossoms to the sun."
Tiny, pleasant and ambitious. An all-round student who is expecting to pursue a college course. Fannie Mae has made many friends during her stay here.

name: Foxwell, Alvin
motto: "Whoever makes two ears of corn, or two blades of grass to grow where only one grew before, deserves better of mankind, and does more essential service to his country than the whole race of politicians put together."
description: He has been one of those quiet boys, the kind who does things you understand. One of Uncle Sam's boys, although he is "doing his bit" by remaining on the farm and raising food for our other soldiers.
text:
"Whoever makes two ears of corn, or two blades of grass to grow where only one grew before, deserves better of mankind, and does more essential service to his country than the whole race of politicians put together."
He has been one of those quiet boys, the kind who does things you understand. One of Uncle Sam's boys, although he is "doing his bit" by remaining on the farm and raising food for our other soldiers.

name: Riffe, Mattie
description: Quiet, industrious, studious and always attending to her business. She has a strong belief that work is necessary as an element in life. Has always made good in her classes. She'll teach the young to shoot straight. Valedictorian.
text: Quiet, industrious, studious and always attending to her business. She has a strong belief that work is necessary as an element in life. Has always made good in her classes. She'll teach the young to shoot straight. Valedictorian.

name: Smith, Marcus
motto: "The first duty of a wise advocate is to convince his opponents that he understands their arguments, and sympathises with their just feelings."
description: Smith and argument are synonymous. Has shown speed and decision in everything he has undertaken. Ardent worker in Y. M. C. A. In a few years we see him as a very successful lawyer.
text:
"The first duty of a wise advocate is to convince his opponents that he understands their arguments, and sympathises with their just feelings."
Smith and argument are synonymous. Has shown speed and decision in everything he has undertaken. Ardent worker in Y. M. C. A. In a few years we see him as a very successful lawyer.

name: Greene, Thelma
motto: "The best and noblest lives are those which are set toward high ideals."
description: Historian—Honorable Mention. Thelma is one of the few girls who has completed the course in printing. Good in mathematics. A member of the Mozart Society. She will be a successful teacher—in the kindergarten, perhaps—and all kids will love her.
text:
"The best and noblest lives are those which are set toward high ideals."
Historian—Honorable Mention. Thelma is one of the few girls who has completed the course in printing. Good in mathematics. A member of the Mozart Society. She will be a successful teacher—in the kindergarten, perhaps—and all kids will love her.

name: Washington, Katie C.
description: Tall, dignified and studious, possessed of winning and gracious ways, and stands out as one of the fairest members of her class. A college professor will meet Katie C. and — wedding cake.
text: Tall, dignified and studious, possessed of winning and gracious ways, and stands out as one of the fairest members of her class. A college professor will meet Katie C. and — wedding cake.

name: Moorman, Glover
motto: "The virtue of a man ought to be measured not by his extraordinary exertions, but by his every-day conduct."
description: Industrious, persevering and thoughtful. Has made for himself a good name.
text:
"The virtue of a man ought to be measured not by his extraordinary exertions, but by his every-day conduct."
Industrious, persevering and thoughtful. Has made for himself a good name.

name: Clayborne, Vina
motto: "The secret of success lies in embracing every opportunity, of seeking high and right ends, and in never forgetting that golden rule of catechism of doing your duty in that station of life to which it please God to call you."
description: Has been with us for some time, and is glad to be relieved of the duties of a school girl. A few years hence we will see her the happy wife of a progressive farmer.
text:
"The secret of success lies in embracing every opportunity, of seeking high and right ends, and in never forgetting that golden rule of catechism of doing your duty in that station of life to which it please God to call you."
Has been with us for some time, and is glad to be relieved of the duties of a school girl. A few years hence we will see her the happy wife of a progressive farmer.

name: Payne, Aaron
motto: "He is the eloquent man who can treat subjects of an humble nature with delicacy, lofty things impressively, and moderate things temperately."
description: Fine Athlete. Very popular with the ladies and well thought of by all. A good extemporaneous speaker and orator. He is sure to make good.
text:
"He is the eloquent man who can treat subjects of an humble nature with delicacy, lofty things impressively, and moderate things temperately."
Fine Athlete. Very popular with the ladies and well thought of by all. A good extemporaneous speaker and orator. He is sure to make good.

name: Smith, Marian
motto: "A faithful and true friend is a living treasure, inestimable in possession, and deeply to be lamented when gone. Nothing is more common than to talk of a friend, nothing more difficult than to find one; nothing more rare than to improve by one as we ought."
description: A former student of Fisk University. Very stylish and attractive. An excellent student, and loved by all.
text:
"A faithful and true friend is a living treasure, inestimable in possession, and deeply to be lamented when gone. Nothing is more common than to talk of a friend, nothing more difficult than to find one; nothing more rare than to improve by one as we ought."
A former student of Fisk University. Very stylish and attractive. An excellent student, and loved by all.

name: Cabiness, Clara
motto: "He that does good to another, does also good to himself; not only in the consequence, but in the very act of doing it; for the consciousness of well-doing is an ample reward."
description: Very dignified and studious. Her orderly conduct serves as an example for all to follow. Will make an exemplary teacher.
text:
"He that does good to another, does also good to himself; not only in the consequence, but in the very act of doing it; for the consciousness of well-doing is an ample reward."
Very dignified and studious. Her orderly conduct serves as an example for all to follow. Will make an exemplary teacher.

name: Combs, Anna
description: Anna has been with us a long time and we will miss her. She always made us glad in the afternoon by bringing us mail—from home. She thinks she is going to teach but hist! She has a secret ambition to take a cottage course.
text: Anna has been with us a long time and we will miss her. She always made us glad in the afternoon by bringing us mail—from home. She thinks she is going to teach but hist! She has a secret ambition to take a cottage course.

name: Buckner, Frances
motto: "Those happy smiles that play on her lips seem not to know what guests are in her eyes, which parting thence as pearls from diamonds dropped."
description: Has an excellent intellect, and is one of our sweetest singers. We all love Frances.
text:
"Those happy smiles that play on her lips seem not to know what guests are in her eyes, which parting thence as pearls from diamonds dropped."
Has an excellent intellect, and is one of our sweetest singers. We all love Frances.

name: Clark, Mattye
motto: "Life is made up, not of great sacrifices or duties, but of little things, in which smiles and kindness, and small obligations, given habitually, are what win and preserve the heart and secure comfort."
description: An all-round student—especially good in Latin. Has made many friends during her stay here.
text:
"Life is made up, not of great sacrifices or duties, but of little things, in which smiles and kindness, and small obligations, given habitually, are what win and preserve the heart and secure comfort."
An all-round student—especially good in Latin. Has made many friends during her stay here.

name: Carter, Mayme
motto: "Think twice before you speak, or act once, and you will speak or act the more wisely for it."
description: Very quiet, slow and orderly. Her greatest pleasure is reading.
text:
"Think twice before you speak, or act once, and you will speak or act the more wisely for it."
Very quiet, slow and orderly. Her greatest pleasure is reading.

name: Williams, Ada B.
motto: "Shun no toil to make yourself remarkable by some one talent—Yet do not devote yourself to one branch exclusively. Strive to get clear notions about all. Give up no science entirely, for all science is one."
description: Talkative, dutiful and energetic. Good in sewing.
text:
"Shun no toil to make yourself remarkable by some one talent—Yet do not devote yourself to one branch exclusively. Strive to get clear notions about all. Give up no science entirely, for all science is one."
Talkative, dutiful and energetic. Good in sewing.

name: Bush, Ethel
description: She hasn't made much noise, but she's always been punctual and dutiful to her class. Will make a successful teacher, and will be loved by her pupils.
text: She hasn't made much noise, but she's always been punctual and dutiful to her class. Will make a successful teacher, and will be loved by her pupils.

name: Samuels, Alice
motto: "The crafty condemn it; the simple admire it; but the wise use it."
description: Very quiet and studious. Reading is her chief delight; it serves for ornament and ability.
text:
"The crafty condemn it; the simple admire it; but the wise use it."
Very quiet and studious. Reading is her chief delight; it serves for ornament and ability.

name: Taylor, Lucile
motto: "High aims form high characters and great objects bring out great minds."
description: Has been with us two years, and has proven to be an ideal young lady. She is energetic with high aims.
text:
"High aims form high characters and great objects bring out great minds."
Has been with us two years, and has proven to be an ideal young lady. She is energetic with high aims.

name: Rogers, Beulah
motto: "True silence is the rest of the mind, and is to the spirit what sleep is to the body, nourishment and refinement. It is a great virtue; it covers folly, keeps secrets, avoids disputes, and prevents sin."
description: A former student of Fisk University. Very quiet, but has a fine intellect. Will make a successful teacher.
text:
"True silence is the rest of the mind, and is to the spirit what sleep is to the body, nourishment and refinement. It is a great virtue; it covers folly, keeps secrets, avoids disputes, and prevents sin."
A former student of Fisk University. Very quiet, but has a fine intellect. Will make a successful teacher.
